title: Editor preset export bundle
description: JSON-Schema document for editor preset export bundles produced by GET /editor/presets/{preset_id}/export and consumed by POST /editor/presets/import. The schema_version envelope is pinned at 1; future shape changes bump the version + add a v1->v2 import migration in editor_presets.py. Hooked into import_preset via local_ai_platform.registries._validate_against_schema (IMPROVE-131 best-effort discipline).

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Pinned at 1 for the W28 IMPROVE-162 baseline; future bumps require a v1->v2 migration in editor_presets.py::import_preset.

name.description: User-facing preset name. Trimmed at import time; empty-after-strip names are rejected.

description.description: Optional prose summary. Empty string is valid (defaults to '' if absent at import time).

operation.description: Operation key (e.g. 'brightness_contrast', 'gaussian_blur'). Operation names are NOT validated by the schema; the apply path raises ValueError on unknown ops at replay time.

params.description: Operation-specific kwargs (free-form object). Per-operation param shapes are NOT validated here — the apply path's per-op handlers do that work.

steps.description: Ordered list of edit operations to replay. An empty list is valid (a preset that does nothing is still a valid preset, e.g. for testing infrastructure).

exported_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp recorded by the export endpoint. Optional + informational only — import_preset mints a fresh created_at on the receiving side rather than carrying this value into the receiver's database.
